hero.name: Adrián Vázquez
hero.bio1: I'm a Systems Engineer and independent software developer.
hero.bio2: I specialize in building scalable web systems and applications to help businesses solve problems and bring their ideas to life.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my recent work. Click on each one for more details.
projects.subtitleFull: Browse the full list of my work and collaborations.

about.heroDescription: A Full Stack developer passionate about technology and complex challenges. I specialize in building scalable, intuitive web applications with an obsessive focus on detail and user experience.
about.heroDescriptionPlain: A Full Stack developer passionate about technology and complex challenges. I specialize in building scalable, intuitive web applications with an obsessive focus on detail and user experience.
about.techStackSubtitle: All the tools I master and use across my projects.
about.careerInstitution: Tecnológico Nacional de México - Campus Tuxtla Gutiérrez
about.careerDescription: Graduated (Pending Degree Certification). Specialization in web and mobile technologies applied to e-commerce.
about.certificatesSubtitle: Continuous validation of my knowledge and commitment to professional excellence.
about.aboutMeSubtitle: Learn a little more about my experience and the tools I use to turn ideas into digital realities.
about.myTrajectoryDesc: I'm a Full Stack developer passionate about building attractive interfaces and robust systems. I focus on creating efficient, scalable solutions with great attention to detail in both frontend and backend. I enjoy solving complex problems and constantly learning new technologies.
about.focusPhilosophyDesc: I believe in software development that not only meets technical requirements but also delivers an exceptional user experience. Every line of code is an opportunity to optimize, innovate, and leave a mark of quality.

faith.title: My Faith & Values
faith.subtitle: The pillar of my life
faith.description: As a Catholic, my faith is the compass that guides my actions and decisions. The values of integrity, service, and perseverance I learn on my spiritual path are reflected in the dedication and honesty with which I approach every software project.

gaming.title: Passion for Gaming
gaming.subtitle: Strategy & Action
gaming.description: From meticulous strategy in Clash Royale and Clash of Clans to the adrenaline of Marvel Rivals and the legendary legacy of Halo. Video games are for me a way to challenge logical thinking and team coordination.

fitness.title: Lifestyle & Fitness
fitness.subtitle: Discipline & Energy
fitness.description: The gym isn't just physical exercise; it's the engine that keeps my focus and discipline at their peak. Training daily helps me clear my mind and strengthen my determination.

contact.title: LET'S WORK
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Tell me the details.
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.description: Full Stack Developer passionate about building exceptional digital solutions.
